creator: wildman@file.pp.ru
text:
first (?) power on the laptop after 30sec-3min have a kernel panic with
"spin lock held too long" message and rebooting laptop.
after rebooting (without power off) laptop work stable

------------------------------------------------------------------
[wildman@wildman //usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC]$ kgdb kernel.debug /var/crash/vmcore.2
